body.title: Add handoff note to /sprint and /fixit for abrupt session ends (auto-compact + budget exhaustion)
body.result: Added Step 2.5 (handoff note) to /sprint SKILL.md: writes in-flight state to today's dated slate immediately after claiming. Added matching step 3b.5 to /fixit SKILL.md. Both survive auto-compact and budget-exhaustion. Clean session close (Step 8) overwrites with done summary.
